query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customers WHERE section='Boonphone') as customers_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contracts WHERE section='Boonphone') as contracts_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM installments WHERE section='Boonphone') as installments_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM payments WHERE section='Boonphone') as payments_count;
